Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on a domain

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete a domain of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} changed a domain of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is changing a domain of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created a domain of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change a domain of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is creating a domain of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted a domain of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is deleting a domain of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create a domain of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
